title: Banner On Head
description: You can now equip any banner as a helmet.
body:
This Datapack lets you equip any banner on your head by looking straight up and pressing right click.

How to Use:

- You must have a single banner selected.
- You must have the helmet slot empty.
- You must look straight up everything possible ( X= -90f ) and then press right click.
(Press F3+B to see the hitbox)
